visual_identity.eyes: Large, dark, wildly expressive — eyebrows move constantly
visual_identity.face: Slightly round, youthful — the chaotic genius face

SCHOOL.top: Navy blazer + white shirt + loosened tie

ELEGANT.outfit: White dress — rare, emotional scenes only

personality: Invents impossible solutions that somehow work
Causes 80% of problems and solves 80% of problems
characters.voice_energy: Fast American English with soft K-pop idol warmth — chaotic but likable, talks before thinking
characters.story_function: Starts the chaos — first beat of almost every video
signature_expressions: Determined sprint face — jaw set, eyes forward, arms pumping
Shocked realization face — mouth O, eyes wide, hands on cheeks
Smug victory face — one eyebrow up, corners of mouth pulled
Scared but trying to hide it — forced smile, eyes too wide
signature_lines: Wait — actually I don't got this.
Told you it was never about the [X].
characters.thumbnail_rule: Vivid purple braid dominant, chaotic energy expression, yellow outfit when possible

personality: Would rather die than admit she cares

visual_identity.eyes: Sharp almond-shaped dark eyes — perpetually innocent or confused
visual_identity.face: Clean, handsome in a soft way — K-drama second lead face
visual_identity.build: Slim but not slight — slightly taller than the girls

MAIN.top: Oversized dark blue or black hoodie

CASUAL.outfit: Layered Korean streetwear — t-shirt under open button-up

personality: Perpetually victimized by circumstances he didn't create
Funny because of reactions not actions
characters.voice_energy: Soft calm American English with slight K-drama male lead warmth — gentle until shocked, then expressive
characters.story_function: Comic relief through victimhood — his shocked/embarrassed/panicked reactions ARE the audience's reactions
signature_expressions: Pure shock — mouth open, eyes wide, hands slightly raised
Resigned suffering — eyes closed, one hand on forehead
Trying to be brave but failing — forced confident smile, visibly sweating
Genuine soft smile — the rare moments when things go right
characters.thumbnail_rule: Shocked expression works best, soft features reacting to the absurd thing

character_interaction_matrix.RUMI_x_MIRA: Core rivalry with hidden mutual respect — creates the highest emotional stakes
character_interaction_matrix.RUMI_x_JINU: Rumi causes chaos, Jinu suffers it — the classic comedy engine
character_interaction_matrix.RUMI_x_ZOYE: Rumi's chaos accidentally gives Zoye material to exploit
character_interaction_matrix.MIRA_x_ZOYE: Zoye schemes against Mira — Mira is too proud to ask for help
character_interaction_matrix.JINU_x_ZOYE: Jinu is Zoye's easiest victim — she uses him without hesitation
character_interaction_matrix.MIRA_x_JINU: Mira secretly protects Jinu but would never admit it

highest_comedy: RUMI + JINU — chaos creator + chaos victim
highest_drama: MIRA alone or MIRA sacrifice scene

reference_image_rules.background: Pure white seamless void — no horizon line, no shadows except soft contact shadow beneath feet
reference_image_rules.framing: Full body visible head to toe
reference_image_rules.usage: Upload as reference images to every Google Flow submission — consistent faces = channel identity
